content.en:
The first thing Ye Tian did when he returned was to give some elixirs, first of all, the people of the Heavenly Pavilion obtained some elixirs one by one, while the other supremes of the human race obtained some top-level elixirs from Ye Tian at a very small price.

This is undoubtedly Ye Tian taking care of the Terran Supremes, otherwise these Terran Supremes would not be able to get these elixirs at all, and they may not even be able to afford them.

Ye Tian was not deliberately generous, but his current strength did not need those elixirs, and the Terran was his foundation, so he naturally wanted to improve the strength of the Terran race a little more to deal with the future dual universe era.

Heavenly Pavilion.

Ye Tian took out a classic book material given to him by Shang, which was about the special biological information about having super-god-level earth-type talents and super-god-level physical body talents.

"Deep Dimension!"

Ye Tian frowned.

The universe is divided into multiple dimensions, and the main space is the most important dimension of the universe, countless races and creatures live here, there is a complete cosmic avenue here, and the other dimensions are relatively special, some have a single avenue rule, restricting other creatures from entering.

Even the Origin Realm is the deepest dimension, although it is very powerful and special, but the rules of the Great Dao are very simple, and the restrictions on other living beings are too great.

In addition, only the main space of the universe can be transcended, and other dimensional worlds cannot be transcended, and some dimensional worlds even have no living beings at all.

However, some dimensional worlds have given birth to powerful creatures, and even super-god-level earth-based talents and super-god-level flesh-type talents.

But such creatures are too rare, and they almost never come out of their own dimensional world, but it is too difficult to find them across the dimensional world, and it is very normal if you are trapped in a special dimensional world and can't get out.

For example, if the Supreme enters the Origin Realm, and the nodes of the Origin Realm change and move, if you can't find a new node, then there is no way to come out.

Therefore, the Supremes did not dare to cross the dimensional world at will, and even if they discovered the dimensional world with high value, they would only let some weak people enter and explore, but they themselves would not enter it.

In the materials given by Shang, almost all of the special creatures recorded are creatures in the deep dimensional world, and their appearance and abilities are recorded on it, and these special creatures are creatures that can be born in most universes.

For example, it is recorded that a special creature called the lazy beast is very large, comparable to a river system, but it is very lazy, and it is not even willing to move, and it sleeps for billions of years.

This creature has a super god-level earth talent, the attack power is not high, but the defense is very terrifying, even a one-star god general can't hurt an inert beast, it can be called one of the strongest defensive creatures in the universe, but it is rarely seen.

Even from the birth of the universe to its demise, no one may be able to see a lazy beast, maybe a lazy beast wakes up and only opens its eyes and continues to sleep, until the universe collapses and stays in one place.

There is also a creature of the desolate dragon, the body is also very large, with a super god-level physical talent, the combat ability is very strong, but it is rarer than the inert beast, some universes do not even have such creatures, and the desolate dragon does not exist in the main space, it will not come in at all, this is also a factor limiting the universe, otherwise with the warlike character of the desolate dragon, if it enters the main space, it will definitely be a disaster in the main space.

......

"It's difficult, although dozens of special creatures are introduced above, there are a few in our universe that are difficult to say, and almost all of them are impossible to find, and can only rely on luck, but now is a special period, I don't have time to look for these special creatures, the Chaos Divine Power Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Power should give up cultivation for the time being!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Anyway, if you don't cultivate the Gu Yuan Imperial Body Divine Power for the time being, with the current three doors and three thousand divine powers, it is enough to cross the universe.

"It's very difficult to improve in other aspects, so let's use the Nine Evil Orbs to refine your will and state of mind, this is one of the rewards obtained by that great being, absolutely extraordinary!"

Ye Tian took out this treasure with a little excitement, and immediately entered it with consciousness.

Rumble!!!!

Countless special evil qi surged in, as if they wanted to kill Ye Tian's consciousness.

In an instant, Ye Tian's consciousness shattered.

But then, Ye Tian found that his consciousness had recondensed, and then continued to crumble, the process was very painful, but he became more and more excited.

Because, he found that his willpower was improving, condensing, and the negative factors in his state of mind were also killed by this endless evil qi.

It is a creature who uses negative factors, and these negative factors will affect the state of mind, even if he has now reached the seventh level of the state of mind, not far from the eighth level, he still cannot ignore the negative factors.

However, there is no way to completely erase the negative factors in the universe, and no matter how powerful the meditation method is, it can only be suppressed, not completely wiped out, but the evil qi of the Nine Evil Orbs can destroy the negative factors.

When the negative factors dissipate, it is many times easier to improve the mood.

"Sure enough, it is a supreme treasure, if I have been refining my will and state of mind with the help of the Nine Evil Treasures, my will will will go to the next level, and my state of mind is also expected to enter the eighth level. In the universe, the seventh level of the state of mind is the limit, and if you step into the eighth level, the state of mind will completely surpass the other supremes!"

Ye Tian thought excitedly.

Next, he used the Nine Evil Orbs day and night to temper his will and state of mind, as if he had given up his cultivation in other directions.

One day!

One year!

Decade!

Century!

Millennium!

Years!

......

Before you know it, 20,000 years have passed!

this day.

The universe roared, the Great Dao appeared, and the rules of the entire universe were changing differently.

All the Supremes looked at the void one after another, some rejoiced, some frowned, and some were indifferent.

Ye Tian also ended his retreat at this time, staring intently at the rules of the Great Dao in the void.

"The rules of the universe have changed, there are some other rules, unfamiliar rules, it is the rules of another universe!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

There are other rules in the universe, which shows that the rules of the two universes have merged with each other, and the real fusion process has begun, in this process, there will be more and more rules of the other universe in the universe, and the fusion of the two universes will also be faster and faster, until finally it is completely merged.

As for whether the fusion will be successful in the end, that's another matter.

"Could it be that the black hole passage at the cosmic collision point can enter people?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

His body did not pass, but directly sent the third deity over.

The strength of the ontology cannot be exposed, otherwise it will fall into passivity.

Although the strength of the third deity is not strong now, it also has the top combat power of the third-class supreme, and it is not a weak supreme among the supremes in the universe, but it doesn't matter if you look at the situation in the past.

As long as you don't reveal your true identity, it doesn't matter.

Whoa!!

Throughout the universe, one Supreme Beings shuttles through the void to the nodes where the two universes collide.

Soon after.

Ye Tian's third deity has arrived!
